    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElfAbiFlags_Mips
    MIPS ABI flags section containing architecture-specific ABI information.
    class 
    ElfRegInfo_Mips

  • Uses of ElfSection in net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

    Subclasses of ElfSection in net.boricj.bft.elf.sections
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElfGroup
    ELF section group containing a set of related sections.
    class 
    ElfNoBits
    ELF section occupying no space in the file (SHT_NOBITS).
    class 
    ElfNullSection
    ELF null section (SHT_NULL).
    class 
    ElfProgBits
    ELF section containing raw byte data (SHT_PROGBITS).
    class 
    ElfRelaTable
    ELF relocation table section with explicit addends (RELA format).
    class 
    ElfRelTable
    ELF relocation table section without explicit addends (REL format).
    class 
    ElfStringTable
    ELF string table section for storing symbol names and section names.
    class 
    ElfSymbolTable
    ELF symbol table section containing symbol entries.

    Method

    Constructors in net.boricj.bft.elf.sections with parameters of type ElfSection
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ElfRelaTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a RELA relocation table with complete properties.
     
    ElfRelaTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a RELA relocation table for the specified section.
     
    ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a new relocation table with specified settings.
     
    ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a new relocation table with default settings.
